channel.title: Beginner on Anohba Jehad
channel.description: Recent content in Beginner on Anohba Jehad

item.title: Threaded Realities: Beyond the Loop
item.description: A* Algorithm Made Easy When we want a computer, robot, or game character to move from one place to another, the biggest challenge is: how to find the shortest and best path? The A* (A-Star) algorithm helps us do exactly that, in a smart and efficient way. What is A* (A-Star)? The A* algorithm is a popular and efficient pathfinding and graph traversal algorithm used to find the shortest path between a start node and a goal node.

item.title: Threaded Realities: Beyond the Loop
